{{Infobox group
| name = Blackflame family
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Blackflame family Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Blackflame]] family was a powerful dynasty of black [[dragons]] that ruled the [[Blackflame Empire]] for over five hundred years. Known for their immense strength, they once controlled half of the [[Ashwind continent]] through unstoppable force, often causing entire sects to surrender before even facing a single [[sacred artist]] from their lineage. Even at lower ranks like [[Copper]], the children of this family were considered lethal threats. Their rule was characterized by great wealth and a unique power known as the [[Path of Black Flame]], which they used to unite their empire. Despite their dominance, the family's decline was caused by the destructive nature of their own [[madra]]. Because human bodies are not naturally suited for [[dragon]] power, the [[Blackflame]] arts eroded the minds and physical forms of its users. This process left many members as twisted husks or caused them to lose their sanity, eventually leading the family to fade into myth and legend. As they dwindled, the [[Naru clan]]—traditionally their servants—gradually took over the daily operations of the empire and eventually ascended to the throne fifty years ago. While many members died out decades ago, some individuals associated with the family or its power still exist.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|For over five centuries, the imperial [[Blackflame]] family maintained their empire through the use of unstoppable force. Although they once united and ruled the entire empire, the [[Naru]] seized control fifty years ago, causing the family to fall from power. This decline nearly led to their extinction because their [[madra]] consumes their own bodies, despite the fact that even their children posed deadly threats at the [[Copper stage]]. Once an extremely wealthy lineage, the family is now defined by their fallen status and the three ancient [[Trials]] they must face.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame family]] held their empire for over five centuries through unstoppable force.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame family]] united the empire and ruled it until the [[Naru]] took over fifty years ago.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9">''Blackflame'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Children]] of the [[Blackflame family]] were deadly threats even at [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame family]] lost the [[Empire]] and almost died out because their [[madra]] eats away at their bodies.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame family]] is an imperial family.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame family]] has three ancient [[Trials]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame family]] was extremely wealthy.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame family]] has fallen.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Blackflame family]] was once in charge of the [[Empire]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|There are no true members of the [[Blackflame family]] remaining.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Blackflame family]] is a reference used by [[Eithan]] regarding the naming of [[Windfall]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|"Orthos served as a liaison between the Arelius and the imperial Blackflame family."<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|"There is no true member of the Blackflame family remaining," he hedged.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“If it’s good enough for the Blackflame Empire, City, and family, it’s good enough for us!” Eithan declared.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
